title: 1. Purpose
content:
BeeConnect is a platform that brings together
 beekeepers and citizens to promote bee health, share
 knowledge, and build a more sustainable
 environment.

title: 2. For Beekeepers
content:
You agree to provide accurate information about
 your hives.

You are responsible for the health and safety of
 your bees.

You agree to follow best practices and local
 regulations.

title: 3. For Citizen
content:
You agree to use the platform to learn, engage,
 and support bee conservation.

You may report bee sightings or environmental
 concerns honestly.
You agree to respect beekeepers and their work.

title: 4. General
content:
We reserve the right to update these terms. Continued
 use of the platform means you accept the updated
 terms.
